title: Senior Plant Manager at EPC Industrie

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at EPC Industrie
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? EPC Industrie in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About EPC Industrie:
EPC Industrie is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EPC Industrie!
